## Description
<!-- Provide a clear description of the changes you have made and the problem it solves. -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] 👾 New Game Addition
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix
- [ ] 💡 Feature/OS Improvement
- [ ] 📝 Documentation Update

## 📸 Visuals (If applicable)
<!-- Please attach screenshots, video recordings, or GIFs showing the changes, especially for UI tweaks or new games! -->

## 🛠️ Verification Checklist
- [ ] My code runs locally with `npm run dev` and has no console errors.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` locally and it compiles without warnings/errors.
- [ ] I have tested this change on both desktop (keyboard controls) and mobile (touch/virtual gamepad).
- [ ] My game adheres to the classic 4-color dot-matrix palette (`#0f380f`, `#306230`, `#8bac0f`, `#9bbc0f`).
- [ ] I have added/updated files under `src/games/` and registered my game in `src/games/index.js` (if adding a game).
